    • Method Detail

      • getEMF

        public static javax.persistence.EntityManagerFactory getEMF()

      • setEMF

        public static void setEMF(javax.persistence.EntityManagerFactory emf)

      • getEntityManager

        public static javax.persistence.EntityManager getEntityManager(java.lang.String ref)
        Retrieves the current EntityManager local to the thread.

        If no EntityManager is open, opens a new EntityManager for the running thread.

        Returns:
        EntityManager

      • closeEntityManager

        public static void closeEntityManager(long tid,
                                      java.lang.String ref)
        Closes the EntityManager local to the thread.

        Start a new database transaction.

                                     java.lang.String ref)
        Commit the database transaction.

      • commitTransaction

        public static void commitTransaction(long tid,
                                     boolean closeEntityManager,
                                     java.lang.String ref)
        Commit the database transaction.

      • rollbackTransaction

        public static void rollbackTransaction(long tid,
                                       java.lang.String ref)
        Rollback the database transaction.

      • closeEntityManager

        public static javax.persistence.EntityManager closeEntityManager(java.lang.String ref)
        Close and return EntityManager from current Thread.
        Returns:
        EntityManager the closed EntityManager
